Description: Provide a secure multi-tenant integration layer between Nextiva and Discord. Establishes the shared bot, tenant linking model, signature verification, and service auth.
Enable Nextiva admins to connect Discord servers and manage event-to-channel mappings through the Nextiva web UI.
Allow authorized Discord users to create Nextiva tickets directly from Discord messages via slash commands.
Deliver ticket lifecycle events and priority-based alerts into configured Discord channels.
Provide admins and operators visibility into integration health, usage metrics, and operational alerting.
Register a single shared Discord App/Bot for all tenants with required scopes (bot, application.commands). Store bot token encrypted in Nextiva secret store.
Define and implement DB schema and CRUD for tenant-server links (tenantId, discordServerId, status, installUserId, timestamps).
Verify all Discord interaction webhooks using Ed25519. Reject invalid requests with 401. Add security tests for replay attempts.
Secure internal event ingestion endpoint with mTLS or service tokens. Unauthorized callers receive 401/403.
Allow Nextiva admin to connect a Discord server via OAuth. Exchange code for tokens; fetch and store guild info. Handle success and error redirects.

Summary: List Connected Discord Servers in UI
Description: Display all Discord servers linked to the tenant via GET /api/integrations/discord/servers. Show server name, status, install date.
Call Discord API to list text channels for a server. Use GET /api/integrations/discord/servers/{serverId}/channels. Only show channels where bot can post.
Allow admins to map event types (ticket.created, ticket.resolved) to channels with optional filters. Persist via PUT /api/integrations/discord/event-mappings.
Register /nextiva-ticket in Discord. Handler receives guild_id, channel_id, user. Return clear error for unsupported servers.
Present Discord modal with Title, Category/Queue, Priority. Pre-fill title from message. Validate required fields.

Summary: Create Ticket in Nextiva From Discord
Description: Call Nextiva Ticket API with tenant ID, description, metadata. Store discord_ticket_links. Post confirmation embed with ticket ID and deep link.
Support config for allowed Discord roles/channels. Reject commands from disallowed sources. Audit blocked attempts.
Accept ticket.created and ticket.resolved events at /internal/nextiva/events. Validate payloads. Queue for Event Router processing.
Load mappings for tenant and event type. Apply filters (e.g. min priority). Enqueue dispatch for each matching mapping.

Summary: Send Discord Embeds for Ticket Events
Description: Post rich embeds with ticket ID, title, status, priority, requester, link. Handle rate limits and permission errors. Log failures.
Support priority filter in mappings. Route high-priority events to #alerts channels. Show alert vs support channel distinction in UI.
Show per-tenant status: Connected / Partially Configured / Error. Include actionable error messages (e.g. bot lacks permission).
Expose GET /api/integrations/discord/metrics with tickets created via Discord and events posted. Support date range.
Log tenantId, eventType, status, errorCode. Dashboards for delivery success, command volume, error rate. Alerts on failure threshold breach.
